## Deployment Signals

1. GitHub Pages deployment live at `https://ramdragneel01.github.io/dragon-portfolio/`.
2. CI pipeline runs lint, type-check, and test on every push.
3. Release workflow tags and publishes artifacts on semantic version tags.
4. Dependabot policy active; security advisories reviewed per `SECURITY.md`.

## Evidence Sources

1. `CHANGELOG.md` — version history and delivery cadence.
2. `.github/workflows/` — CI, Pages deploy, and release workflows.
3. `src/utils/*.test.js` — unit test coverage for API, chat runtime, and theme utilities.
4. `DEPENDENCY_POLICY.md` — dependency update and audit governance.

## Reproduction

```bash
npm ci
npm test
npm run lint
```

## Limitations

- Unit tests cover utility logic only; E2E visual tests not yet included.
- Measured impact cards in the UI reflect curated estimates, not automated telemetry.

## Next Steps

1. Add E2E smoke tests for the GitHub profile feed and chat endpoints.
2. Publish a quarterly snapshot comparing live portfolio visit patterns.
3. Add visual regression or screenshot-diff checks to the CI pipeline.
